gold_sql: SELECT T1.SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL AS T1 JOIN FACT_SCHOOL_GOVERNANCE AS T2 ON T1.SCHOOL_ID = T2.SCHOOL_ID WHERE T2.CONSTITUTION_OF_SMC = '1 - Yes' GROUP BY T1.SCHOOL_ID ORDER BY T1.SCHOOL_ID ASC
